name_en: Original leather with sheepskin lining, exact replica ZP spring needle U-buckle
name_cn:
Original leather with sheepskin lining, exact replica ZP spring needle U-buckle
Classic Lady Diana Bag, a must-have three-compartment mini bag for everyone 😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence 💃🏻. Crossbody or handheld, it exudes femininity. A classic fashion style beloved by fashion icons on Instagram. Don't miss out ❤️
size: 17*7*15cm
